name: glyphall
description: Pretext-powered glyph relayout and orientation animation for browser reading surfaces.

scripts.build:js: rm -rf dist && bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target browser --format esm
scripts.build:demo: rm -rf demo-dist && mkdir -p demo-dist && cp demo/index.html demo-dist/index.html && bun build ./demo/main.ts --outfile ./demo-dist/app.js --target browser --format esm --minify
scripts.build: bun run build:js && bun run build:types
